positive: Minimalist vector illustration of celestial flora and mystical woodland elements. Features glowing, stylized bioluminescent mushrooms, ethereal vines, and crescent moon accents forming a symmetrical, continuous border pattern. The composition should utilize strong black outlines and deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, violet) contrasting sharply against an off-white background, maximizing readability for apparel printing. Highly detailed, clean silhouettes, tattoo flash style, symmetrical radial symmetry, centered composition, glowing effect, volumetric lighting, high contrast, graphic novel art style, linework, digital painting.
